hero.subline: PhD mathematician working at the intersection of convex analysis, deep learning, and image processing — with a focus on reducing the black box.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a postdoctoral researcher at Chiang Mai University with a PhD in Mathematics. I work at the intersection of convex optimization, fixed-point theory, and deep learning — and I care about making models interpretable instead of treating them as magic. I apply this to image restoration, classification, and real data pipelines, including medical imaging work with clinical collaborators.
about.locationDetail: Chiang Mai, Thailand — at Chiang Mai University. Open to international collaboration and remote research projects.
about.researchToolsDetail: Python, PyTorch, NumPy, OpenCV, and a pile of LaTeX. I write the math, train the model, clean the data, and ship the interface.

research.title: Research Focus
research.intro: Five pillars that define how I work and what I ship.

math.title: Math-First Researcher
math.blurb: PhD-level convex analysis and fixed-point theory — the engine behind every algorithm I publish.

dl.title: Deep Learning Practitioner
dl.blurb: I train models end-to-end in PyTorch, not just read papers about them.

interp.title: Interpretability Advocate
interp.blurb: My signature angle: fuse mathematical structure with deep models to shrink the black box.

image.title: Image & Data Engineer
image.blurb: Image reconstruction, classification, CSV preprocessing, pipelines that survive real data.

ship.title: Builder Who Ships
ship.blurb: Web tools, mobile predictors, interactive demos. I don't stop at a notebook.

publications.title: Selected Publications
publications.intro: Peer-reviewed papers at the intersection of fixed-point theory, convex optimization, and deep learning. Published in international journals (Q1/Q2).

demos.title: Live Demos
demos.subtitle: Small web tools I built to solve problems I kept hitting in my own research.

mlPlatform.title: ML Research Platform
mlPlatform.blurb: A live playground for the machine-learning models from my research papers — upload data, run the model, see the result in your browser.

hypertension.title: Hypertension Risk Predictor
hypertension.blurb: Mobile-first risk estimator trained with Village Health Volunteers in San Pa Tong.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.blurb: React 19 + Three.js + Firebase — the site you're reading right now.

contact.title: Let's build something together
contact.subtitle: Research collaborations, interpretable-ML projects, image-processing consulting, or just a hard problem you want a mathematician to look at — drop me a message.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me the problem, data, and what 'done' looks like.

experiences.title: Proactive Researcher
contents: Conducting advanced research in Nonlinear and Convex Analysis.
Developing novel algorithms for Optimization and Fixed Point Theory.
Collaborating on international research projects, including short-term research in Japan.
Collaborating with clinical researchers on interpretable image-classification models.

experiences.title: PhD in Mathematics
contents: Focused on advanced mathematical modeling and algorithm development.
Published multiple high-impact papers in international journals (Q1/Q2).
Gained expertise in Machine Learning and Deep Learning applications.

experiences.title: Teaching Assistant in Calculus
contents: Assisted in teaching Calculus to undergraduate students.
Provided academic support and led tutorial sessions.
Managed classroom activities and graded assignments.

experiences.title: Short-term Researcher
contents: Participated in international research exchanges focused on complex analysis.
Presented research findings at ICNS2024 and other international forums.
Collaborated with international experts in the field of mathematics.
